choose.when: AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM business_application ba WHERE ba.target_person_id=p.person_id AND ba.applicant_user_id=#{scope.userId})
AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM business_application ba WHERE ba.target_person_id=p.person_id AND ba.applicant_department_id=#{scope.departmentId})

where.if: AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM floating_population f WHERE f.person_id=p.person_id AND f.status=#{q.floatingStatus})
AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM certificate c WHERE c.person_id=p.person_id AND c.certificate_type=#{q.certificateType})
AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM key_population k WHERE k.person_id=p.person_id AND k.key_type=#{q.keyPopulationType} AND k.status='ACTIVE')
AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM business_application ba WHERE ba.target_person_id=p.person_id AND ba.applicant_department_id=#{q.departmentId})

mapper.sql: FROM person p LEFT JOIN residence r ON r.person_id=p.person_id AND r.status='ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN household h ON h.household_id=r.household_id LEFT JOIN person hp ON hp.person_id=h.head_person_id LEFT JOIN household_member hm ON hm.household_id=h.household_id AND hm.person_id=p.person_id AND hm.status='ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT p.person_id,p.name,p.gender,p.birth_date,p.id_card masked_identity_no,p.phone masked_phone,p.current_status_code person_status,h.household_id,h.household_no,hp.name head_person_name,hm.relationship,(h.head_person_id=p.person_id) household_head,r.region_code current_region_code,r.registered_address current_address,r.status residence_status GROUP BY p.person_id,p.name,p.gender,p.birth_date,p.id_card,p.phone,p.current_status_code,h.household_id,h.household_no,hp.name,hm.relationship,r.region_code,r.registered_address,r.status ORDER BY ${orderBy} ${direction} LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

choose.when: AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM business_application ba WHERE ba.target_household_id=h.household_id AND ba.applicant_user_id=#{scope.userId})
AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM business_application ba WHERE ba.target_household_id=h.household_id AND ba.applicant_department_id=#{scope.departmentId})

mapper.sql: HAVING 1=1 AND COUNT(DISTINCT hm.person_id)>=#{q.memberCountMin}AND COUNT(DISTINCT hm.person_id)<=#{q.memberCountMax}AND COUNT(DISTINCT kp.person_id)>0AND COUNT(DISTINCT kp.person_id)=0

FROM household h LEFT JOIN person hp ON hp.person_id=h.head_person_id LEFT JOIN household_member hm ON hm.household_id=h.household_id AND hm.status='ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN key_population kp ON kp.person_id=hm.person_id AND kp.status='ACTIVE' GROUP BY h.household_id,h.household_no,hp.name,h.address,h.region_code,h.household_type,h.status
mapper.select: SELECT h.household_id,h.household_no,hp.name head_person_name,h.address,h.region_code,h.household_type,h.status,COUNT(DISTINCT hm.person_id) member_count,(COUNT(DISTINCT kp.person_id)>0) contains_key_population ORDER BY h.household_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.sql: SELECT 'IN' direction,mi.in_id migration_id,mi.person_id,p.name person_name,mi.migration_type,mi.from_region_code source_region_code,mi.to_region_code target_region_code,mi.business_status status,mi.in_date execute_date,mi.executed_at,a.application_no,a.applicant_user_id,a.applicant_department_id,a.applicant_region_code FROM migration_in mi JOIN person p ON p.person_id=mi.person_id JOIN business_application a ON a.application_id=mi.application_id UNION ALL SELECT 'OUT',mo.out_id,mo.person_id,p.name,mo.migration_type,mo.from_region_code,mo.to_region_code,mo.business_status,mo.out_date,mo.executed_at,a.application_no,a.applicant_user_id,a.applicant_department_id,a.applicant_region_code FROM migration_out mo JOIN person p ON p.person_id=mo.person_id JOIN business_application a ON a.application_id=mo.application_id
mapper.select: SELECT x.direction,x.migration_id,x.person_id,x.person_name,x.migration_type,x.source_region_code,x.target_region_code,x.status,x.execute_date,x.executed_at,x.application_no FROM () x ORDER BY x.execute_date DESC,x.migration_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
